def fast_sort(arr):
    arr = list(arr)
    n = len(arr)
    gaps = []
    gap = n // 2
    while gap > 0:
        gaps.append(gap)
        gap //= 2
    for gap in gaps:
        for i in range(gap, n):
            temp = arr[i]
            j = i
            while j >= gap and arr[j - gap] > temp:
                arr[j] = arr[j - gap]
                j -= gap
            arr[j] = temp
    return arr
